jobs.title: Customer Success Engineer
jobs.content: <p><strong>Customer Success Engineer</strong></p><p>Descope is the developer-first authentication-as-a-service platform pioneered around no-code-CIAM & passwordless-auth / drag-drop-flows.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, MCP
jobs.content: <p>Lead Descope's Engineering function across the Authentication / Flows / Token Exchange platform stack with MCP integration support.</p>
